reasoning.typography: Custom Fricolage Grotesque + Mackinac combo creates real personality—'fearlessly' in italic serif against sans headlines is confident, not stencil
reasoning.hierarchy: Hero dominates cleanly with scale contrast, though secondary content hierarchy weakens—'Modern Compute' section feels like it drops 3 weight classes
reasoning.distinctiveness: Whimsical hand-drawn illustration system is genuinely ownable—couldn't swap this for any other dev platform, the visual language is utterly specific
reasoning.color: Restrained purple/pink gradient with confident use of accent purple CTA (<5% of canvas), though gradient background risks trend-chasing
reasoning.density: Hero has breathing room but not boring uniform padding—illustration fills space asymmetrically, creating actual composition rather than grid blocks
reasoning.voice: Avoids 'Features/Pricing/Testimonials' stencil—'Build fast. Run any code fearlessly' is declarative positioning, not generic benefit list

winning_patterns: Genuinely distinctive illustration system that creates brand memory
Typography pairing (sans + serif italic) does real work for emphasis
Headline copy has rhythm and personality ('fearlessly' as payoff)
Asymmetric composition—illustration wraps around text organically
Restrained color palette with disciplined accent use
anti_patterns: Gradient background feels 2023-trendy rather than timeless
Secondary headline 'Modern Compute Without the Complexity' drops too much visual weight
Body copy gray is safe/forgettable—could push tone harder
Bottom section preview hints at generic 'benefit blocks' pattern emerging
Navigation is standard issue horizontal list—missed branding opportunity
